TextEdit.title: Text Edit
TextEdit.description: Represents a single custom text replacement on the website.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the text was last modified.

HistoryEntry.title: History Entry
HistoryEntry.description: An entry in the audit log tracking text modifications.

textId.description: The identifier of the text element edited.

oldValue.description: The previous text value before modification.

newValue.description: The new text value after modification.

edits/{textId}.description: Collection of customized page content text overrides indexed by element ID.

history/{entryId}.description: A rolling chronological audit trail of all text overrides made on the platform.
